title: 圓滾貓情緒爆發
description: 圓滾滾灰貓的情緒大爆發！16種崩潰日常
style_prefix: indie cartoon style, chunky bold black outlines, round simple shapes, flat color fills, big expressive eyes, exaggerated mouth, quirky character design, chubby grey cat, full body, white background

stickers.prompt: extremely angry screaming, puffed up, red face, steam from ears, fists clenched, mouth wide open, furious, bold Chinese text "崩潰" above the cat
shocked stunned face, jaw dropped wide open, eyes popping out of head, frozen in disbelief, sweat drops, bold Chinese text "傻眼" above the cat
rolling eyes dramatically, eyes rolled all the way up showing whites only, flat unamused mouth, arms crossed, deeply annoyed, bold Chinese text "白眼" above the cat
extremely happy satisfied, sunglasses on, leaning back cool pose, big grin showing teeth, thumbs up, sparkles around, bold Chinese text "爽！" above the cat
one eye crying with tear, other eye laughing, mouth half smile half frown, confused mixed emotions, sweat drop, bold Chinese text "哭笑不得" above the cat
exhausted tired, dark circles under eyes, soul leaving body as ghost, slouching, lifeless expression, drained, bold Chinese text "心累" above the cat
burning with rage, fire aura around body, veins popping on forehead, sharp teeth showing, fists raised, extreme anger, bold Chinese text "怒！" above the cat
terrified scared, fur standing on end, jumping in shock, eyes huge round white, mouth screaming, tail puffed up, bold Chinese text "嚇死" above the cat
lying flat on ground face down, completely given up on life, dead fish eyes, no energy, melted into floor, existential crisis, bold Chinese text "厭世" above the cat
pouting with big watery puppy eyes, lower lip trembling, tears forming but not falling, clutching own tail for comfort, feeling wronged, bold Chinese text "委屈" above the cat
going berserk crazy, running wildly, limbs flailing everywhere, wild crazy eyes, tongue out, chaotic energy lines, out of control, bold Chinese text "暴走" above the cat
completely speechless, blank stare, three dots above head, mouth as straight flat line, dead inside expression, frozen, bold Chinese text "無語" above the cat
flipping a table angrily, table flying in air, furious expression, veins on forehead, extreme frustration, dramatic action pose, bold Chinese text "翻桌" above the cat
irritated annoyed, scratching own head frantically with both paws, messy fur, gritting teeth, stress marks around head, agitated, bold Chinese text "煩！" above the cat
staring into space blankly, empty hollow eyes, drooling slightly, soul floating out of body, completely zoned out, nobody home, bold Chinese text "放空" above the cat
exploding with anger, mushroom cloud explosion behind, whole body shaking, face bright red, smoke coming out of ears, nuclear rage, bold Chinese text "炸了" above the cat
